text: vv. 6-69, cf. I Esdras 2.1-67. It is evident from the slight variations which will be noticed among the figures that our text of the sacred scriptures is not always immune from occasional errors in copying.
The note here given is only found in the Latin version. It will be observed that verse 73 here is nevertheless a repetition of I Esdras 2.70, and seems to belong to the register-document.
